atlases.title: Pathogen Atlas
atlases.summary: An origin-and-spread atlas that links geography, uncertainty, papers, and prior writing instead of flattening pathogens into another story stream.
atlases.evidence_model: Origin claims, route confidence, and linked papers
atlases.long_note: A dark atlas of pathogen origins, spread routes, uncertainty, papers, and disease geography.

atlases.title: Maritime Disease Atlas
atlases.summary: A darker, map-forward atlas of shipboard disease ecology, ports, vectors, and the movement constraints of life at sea.
atlases.evidence_model: Map scenarios with route, mechanism, and historical narrative
atlases.long_note: A map-forward atlas of shipboard disease ecology, ports, vectors, provisions, quarantine, violence, and the movement constraints of life at sea.

atlases.title: Revolutionary War Disease Atlas
atlases.summary: A historical epidemiology section focused on colonial and Revolutionary-era disease ecology, troop movement, and the public-health constraints around the founding period.
atlases.long_note: A structured historical atlas page connecting colonial disease ecology, military movement, smallpox, inoculation, and public-health constraints around the founding period.

atlases.title: Viking Health Atlas
atlases.summary: A Norse-world disease and health map that ties Greenland, Vinland, settlement ecology, and pre-Columbian contact arguments into one visual surface.
atlases.evidence_model: Map-based historical synthesis plus linked essays
atlases.long_note: A Norse-world health and disease map connecting Greenland, Vinland, settlement ecology, pre-Columbian contact arguments, and epidemic uncertainty.
